Name: delete_user_departments
SQL: WITH mutation_result AS (DELETE FROM "public"."user_departments" WHERE user_departments."user_id" = $1::uuid AND user_departments."department_id" = $2::uuid RETURNING *) SELECT json_build_object('affected_rows', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mutation_result), 'returning', (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(row_to_json("_e")), '[]'::json) FROM (SELECT mutation_result."role" AS "role", "mutation_result.r.department"."department" AS "department", "mutation_result.r.user"."user" AS "user" FROM mutation_result LEFT OUTER JOIN LATERAL (WITH "mutation_result.r.department.base" AS (SELECT * FROM "public"."departments" WHERE "mutation_result"."department_id" = "id" LIMIT 1) SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "mutation_result.r.department.base"."id" AS "id", "mutation_result.r.department.base"."name" AS "name") AS "_e")) AS "department" FROM "mutation_result.r.department.base") AS "mutation_result.r.department" ON ('true') LEFT OUTER JOIN LATERAL (WITH "mutation_result.r.user.base" AS (SELECT * FROM "auth"."users" WHERE "mutation_result"."user_id" = "id" LIMIT 1) SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "mutation_result.r.user.base"."id" AS "id", "mutation_result.r.user.base"."email" AS "email") AS "_e")) AS "user" FROM "mutation_result.r.user.base") AS "mutation_result.r.user" ON ('true')) AS "_e"))
